channel.title: guardduty on Oleksandr Kulbida
channel.description: Recent content in guardduty on Oleksandr Kulbida

item.title: GuardDuty, phishing URLs, and SSRF: what DNS alerts really mean
item.description: This post is a general walkthrough of a common pattern: Amazon GuardDuty flags DNS activity toward a phishing or otherwise suspicious domain, the cluster looks “clean,” and the real issue is not malware on the node but application behavior—resolving or fetching arbitrary URLs from user-supplied content. That behavior couples alert noise with a genuine SSRF-class risk. Below is a concise chain-of-events model, concrete examples (CLI and code), and what “expected” outputs look like when investigating.
